name: Network Operating Systems: 1998 Practice Summary — Mockup/Template
description: A draft/skeleton version of Aberdeen Group's Network Operating Systems (NOS) 1998 Practice Summary, covering the competitive landscape among Novell NetWare, IBM OS/2 Warp Server, and Microsoft Windows NT Server. The document includes a table of contents, preface with strategic market questions, and abbreviated supplier abstracts for IBM, Microsoft, and Novell — but substantive body content is largely absent or placeholder. The strategic questions posed reflect the pivotal moment when Microsoft NT Server was rapidly displacing legacy NOS vendors.
